renames.rationale: Strings 'version', 'The JSON version is not accepted', 'type must be number' + called from main config parser FUN_14001b450; validates the 'version' JSON field as numeric.
Only string 'type must be string, but is '; small helper called from config parser FUN_14001b450; throws on non-string JSON values. Generic string-field extractor.
Strings 'acceptedControls', 'The accepted control is not recognized', 'type must be string'; called from FUN_14001b450; validates a list of accepted service control names.
Strings 'registeredEvents', 'The registered event is not recognized', 'type must be string'; called from FUN_14001b450; parses registered-event list, allocates entries via operator_new.
String 'Could not open the configuration file.'; uses _Ios_base_dtor (fstream); calls FUN_14001b450 (config parser) after open. Top-level config loader.

Strings 'serviceName','serviceDisplayName','serviceGroup','serviceDescription','relativeDllPath','runProtected'; dispatches to version/controls/events sub-parsers; Windows version check via VerifyVersionInfoW.
Tiny wrapper calling fflush via _guard_dispatch_icall; CFG-guarded vtable thunk over fflush.
Wraps setvbuf with FUN_14001d8d0 helper; small stdio buffer-mode adapter.
Calls fsetpos via thunk; stream seek wrapper used by stream abstraction layer.
Calls common_fseek + fgetpos; combined seek/tell adapter over CRT FILE*.
Calls fwrite via _guard_dispatch_icall; size validation via FUN_1400316b0; output write adapter.
Calls fread via _guard_dispatch_icall with size validation; counterpart to stream_write_buffer.
Calls fgetc + ungetc via guard dispatch; character-level stream read with pushback support.
Calls ungetc; pushback adapter for the stream abstraction layer.
Calls fputc and fwrite via guard dispatch; character/buffer write adapter.
